commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=42c2af5a3c6f81d18f383c7386a1de0a940448cd)
commands.review_summary:
The branch caps embedded-agent reserve and keep-recent compaction budgets when a model context window is known, centralizes summary-overhead tokens, and updates generated config help plus gateway config docs.

PR surface: Source +33, Tests +38, Docs +2, Generated 0. Total +73 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main caps only the floor, not already-high reserveTokens or keepRecentTokens, so a known 16K context can still retain impossible budgets before this PR.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow docs repair is suitable for automation, while maintainer review still owns the compatibility acceptance before merge.

target.title: fix(agents): cap compaction budgets for small contexts
target.body:
## Summary

- cap embedded-agent compaction reserve when the known model context window would otherwise leave no usable prompt budget
- cap keep-recent tokens to the prompt budget remaining after reserve while preserving explicit summary overhead
- centralize the compaction summary overhead constant and update config help/types, generated config baseline hash, and gateway config docs to document context-window caps

## Verification

Behavior addressed: small-context runs no longer retain impossible compaction `reserveTokens` or `keepRecentTokens` budgets when `contextTokenBudget` is known, and compacted tails no longer consume the whole post-reserve prompt budget before the summary is added.

Real environment tested: focused local Vitest/docs/format/lint proof in a Codex worktree and AWS Crabbox Linux changed gate.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```sh
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/agent-settings.test.ts --reporter=dot
node --import tsx scripts/generate-config-doc-baseline.ts --check
node scripts/check-docs-mdx.mjs docs/gateway/config-agents.md
node scripts/format-docs.mjs --check docs/gateway/config-agents.md
node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/agent-settings.ts src/agents/agent-settings.test.ts src/agents/agent-compaction-constants.ts src/agents/compaction-planning.ts src/config/schema.help.ts src/config/types.agent-defaults.ts
node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/agent-settings.ts src/agents/agent-settings.test.ts src/agents/agent-compaction-constants.ts src/agents/compaction-planning.ts src/config/schema.help.ts src/config/types.agent-defaults.ts
git diff --check origin/main...HEAD
node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --target linux --idle-timeout 90m --ttl 180m --timing-json --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"
```

Evidence after fix: refreshed head `42c2af5a3c6`; focused local wrapper passed `src/agents/agent-settings.test.ts` with 36/36 tests after rebasing onto current `origin/main`; generated config baseline check, docs MDX, docs formatting, oxfmt, oxlint, and diff checks passed. AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed` passed with provider `aws`, lease `cbx_0b3bd9af833f`, slug `amber-lobster`, run `run_242541e1c176`, machine `c7a.8xlarge`, exit `0`, and `leaseStopped=true`; selected lanes were `core`, `coreTests`, and `docs`.

Observed result after fix: a 16K-context profile resolves reserve to `8,384` and keep-recent to `4,000`; configured over-budget reserve and keep-recent values are capped to the available context window while leaving summary overhead; when no context window is known, existing uncapped behavior is preserved.

What was not tested: no live Ollama generation for this patch; the changed behavior is the embedded-agent settings normalization layer and is covered by focused settings tests and remote changed-gate proof.
target.author: vincentkoc

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
